title: German-Style Empanada Filling
description: A twist on traditional empanadas, this German-inspired filling is made with crunchy corn and a hint of Venezuelan flair.
instructions: Roll out empanada dough to desired thickness.
In a large skillet, sauté onion and bell pepper until tender.
Add cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper to skillet and stir to combine.
Stir in corn and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Spoon filling mixture onto one half of empanada dough, leaving a 1/2-inch border.
Top with cheddar cheese and fold dough in half to enclose.
Use a fork to crimp edges and create a decorative border.
Place empanadas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
